title: Begunbari Kali Temple
tagline: Begunbari Kali Temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Begunbari Kali Temple is a Hindu temple, located in Begunbari, Purba Medinipur, West Bengal, near Khirai railway station in the Panskura block.
overview.description: Begunbari Kali Temple is a Hindu temple, located in Begunbari, Purba Medinipur, West Bengal, near Khirai railway station in the Panskura block. Situated on the western bank of the Kangsabati River, the temple's presiding deity is Sashan Kali—an incarnation of Goddess Kali.

topPlaces.name: Valley of Flowers (West Bengal)
topPlaces.description: The Valley of Flowers Khirai is nestled in the upper expanses of Kansai (River Kansabati) near Khirai railway station in the Panskura region of India. The lower reaches of Kansai near Dokanda village is known as Kansai Valley.

topPlaces.name: Bhavatarini Shmashanpith Kali Temple
topPlaces.description: Bhavatarini Shmashanpith Kali Temple is a popular Hindu temple located in Balidangri, Purba Medinipur, West Bengal, near Balidangri Primary School in Panskura block. It is situated on the eastern bank of the Kangsabati River, the presiding deity of the temple is Bhavatarini Kali, an aspect of Goddress Kali.

topPlaces.name: Panskura (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Panskura is a community development block that forms an administrative division in Tamluk subdivision of Purba Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Panskura
topPlaces.description: Panskura is a town and municipality in Purba Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is situated on the river bank of Kangsabati Kangsabati River (variously known as Kasai and Cossye).

topPlaces.name: Uttar Mechogram
topPlaces.description: Uttar Mechogram (also called Uttar Mechgram) is a village, in Panskura CD block in Tamluk subdivision of Purba Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Radhamohanpur
topPlaces.description: Radhamohanpur is a village in Debra Community Development Block in West Medinipur District of West Bengal, India. It is located in the Burdwan Division, 28 km towards East from District headquarters Midnapore.

topPlaces.name: Purbba Gopalpur
topPlaces.description: Purbba Gopalpur is a village in the Panskua CD block in the Tamluk subdivision of the Purba Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Dakshin Maynadal

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Begunbari Kali Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Begunbari Kali Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Begunbari Kali Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Begunbari Kali Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Begunbari Kali Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Begunbari Kali Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Begunbari Kali Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Begunbari Kali Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Valley of Flowers (West Bengal), Bhavatarini Shmashanpith Kali Temple, Panskura (community development block), Panskura, Uttar Mechogram.
